title: Object Names and IDs
text:
Each
object
in your cluster has a
Name
that is unique for that type of resource.
Every Kubernetes object also has a
UID
that is unique across your whole cluster.
For example, you can only have one Pod named
myapp-1234
within the same
namespace
, but you can have one Pod and one Deployment that are each named
myapp-1234
.
For non-unique user-provided attributes, Kubernetes provides
labels
and
annotations
.
